title: Dimensional Protection
description: A small Server-Side tool to protect dimensions (for modded SMP,s)
body:
Dimensional Protection is a easy and small Server-Side tool to protect the "Nether" and "End" dimension from players that want to travel in this dimension.


**Functions:**

Player get blocked from the End Portal and Nether Portal without OP,

Player automaticly teleported/kicked out of the "Nether" or "End" dimension to the 
"Overworld",

**Config support** ( < 1.20.6 --> "serverconfig" folder | > 1.21.1 --> "config" folder),

**(DEBUG)** Support for other CUSTOM dimensions with custom biomes (not recommonded to combind this 2 other configs)

**Versions:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Forge:** 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.20.1
**NeoForge:** 1.20.4, 1.20.6, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8, 26.1.2 (26.1.2 with Gamerules)

</details>

**Config Preview:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

["Dimension Protection"]

    #Toggle the protection that players want to travel in The End dimension
  | "End Protection" = false

    #Toggle the protection that players want to travel in the Nether dimension
  | "Nether Protection" = false

    #Toggle the protection of all other modded dimensions (not recommonded to combind the other configs)
  | "Other Dimension Protection (DEBUG)" = false

</details>
